summary: Implemented semantic search (Issue #63) with TDD approach. Added count_embeddings() to SymbolStore, made matches_file_type pub(crate), extended SearchError with Embedding/NoEmbeddings variants, added SemanticSearchResult struct and 3 output formatters (human/json/path), implemented run_semantic_search/enrich_with_metadata/apply_semantic_filters core logic, added --semantic CLI option with proper conflicts_with_all, and added 7 new tests (2 unit tests for count_embeddings, 5 CLI integration tests for --semantic conflicts and acceptance).
